# kSecAttrLabel

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that’s a string indicating the item’s label.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrLabel: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and contains the user-visible label for this item.

On key creation, if not explicitly specified, this attribute defaults to `NULL`.
title: kSecAttrLabel
